falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 4000 (key support level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this level would indicate a bearish trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the pattern similarity to a bullish bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ rises to 200% above its 30-day average while prices make a lower high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a 'blowoff top' scenario (contrary to the 84% pattern match), proving the current verdict incorrect through clear volume-price divergence

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis point rate hike in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic move would create immediate market volatility that would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by introducing a new, observable macro shock

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
